title: PrestaShop
description: Open-source e-commerce platform for building and managing online stores, with a built-in admin back office and a marketplace of modules and themes.
installation: PrestaShop requires MySQL/MariaDB (it does not support PostgreSQL). This template provisions the prestashop-mysql add-on (db/user/password all 'prestashop' - ROTATE before production). PS_INSTALL_AUTO=1 runs the installer automatically on first boot using ADMIN_MAIL/ADMIN_PASSWD - change ADMIN_PASSWD (default 'prestashop' here) and ADMIN_MAIL immediately, then delete or rename the /admin folder after install as PrestaShop requires. PS_DOMAIN is set to the app host so install URLs resolve; if you later change the domain, update Shop URL under Shop Parameters > Traffic & SEO. Optional: set PS_ENABLE_SSL=1 once TLS is fronting the app.
